# rentlist — Crowdsourced Rent Map for Indian Cities

> rentlist is a free, anonymous rent-mapping platform that shows what people actually pay for rent across Indian cities. No logins, no brokers, no fake listings.

## What is rentlist?

rentlist is an interactive map where tenants anonymously pin their actual rent. Anyone can see real rental prices across neighborhoods — helping people make informed decisions about where to live and what to pay.

## Cities Covered

- Bangalore (Bengaluru)
- Mumbai
- Delhi NCR
- Hyderabad
- Chennai
- Pune

## Data Available Per Pin

Each rent pin includes:
- Monthly rent amount (INR)
- BHK type (1RK, 1BHK, 2BHK, 3BHK, 4BHK+)
- Furnishing status (unfurnished, semi-furnished, fully furnished)
- Society type (gated community or independent house)
- Neighborhood / area name
- Security deposit (amount and months)
- Available from date
- Floor number and area (sq ft)
- Notes (society name, amenities, etc.)

## How It Works

1. Open rentlist.co.in
2. Select a city from the dropdown
3. Browse the map to see rent pins color-coded by type:
   - Teal pins = Tenant posts (what people pay)
   - Amber pins = Owner listings (available flats)
   - Purple pins = Flatmate seekers
4. Click any pin to see full details
5. Click "Pin Your Rent" to anonymously share your own rent

## Data Characteristics

- Crowdsourced from real tenants and Reddit communities (r/BangaloreSocial, r/bangalorerentals)
- Updated continuously as new users pin their rent
- All data is anonymous — no personal information is stored
- Pins auto-expire: owner listings after 15 days, tenant data after 1 year
- Community-moderated via report system (3 reports = auto-removal)

## Typical Rent Ranges (Bangalore, 2025-2026)

| Area | 1BHK | 2BHK | 3BHK |
|------|------|------|------|
| Koramangala | 14,000-25,000 | 25,000-45,000 | 38,000-70,000 |
| Indiranagar | 15,000-28,000 | 28,000-50,000 | 42,000-80,000 |
| HSR Layout | 12,000-22,000 | 22,000-38,000 | 35,000-55,000 |
| Whitefield | 10,000-18,000 | 18,000-32,000 | 28,000-48,000 |
| Electronic City | 7,000-13,000 | 13,000-22,000 | 20,000-35,000 |
| BTM Layout | 10,000-18,000 | 18,000-30,000 | 28,000-45,000 |
| Marathahalli | 10,000-18,000 | 18,000-30,000 | 28,000-48,000 |

## Data Access

Rent data is publicly viewable on the interactive map at https://rentlist.co.in. Select a city, browse neighborhoods, and click pins to see full details.

Available cities: Bangalore, Mumbai, Delhi NCR, Hyderabad, Chennai, Pune.

For programmatic access or data partnerships, visit the website or open a GitHub issue at https://github.com/venugopalarjun/rentlist.

## URL

https://rentlist.co.in

## Contact

This is an open community project. No login required.
